hotel_name: Khách sạn Haku Boutique Quy Nhơn - Lê Lợi (Haku Boutique Hotel Quy Nhơn -  Lê Lợi)

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: I booked a room on the app, but when I contacted the phone number provided to check in, it was not the hotel's number and they claimed it was a scam, which made me very upset as I thought I lost my money. The hotel air conditioning was not cool, and the bathroom was not very clean either. They said it was a breakfast buffet, but in reality, it was just a meal voucher, and the menu only had a few items with each person allowed to choose only one dish.

reviews.title: A bait and switch experience
reviews.positives:
This property was not the property we booked. I booked two rooms the newer HAKU in the same city. Our driver delivered us to this hotel. When in our “king standard” room I started comparing pix to the double bed closet room I was shown.  The front desk when asked told us we had been moved to this hotel because the other was damaged by the tropical storm. When asked why they hadn’t notified me, I was told they couldn’t get in touch. Funnily they had responded to every other communication I sent and I even received communication. Regarding my airport transfer the morning of the trip. 
We were told we could
Move to another hotel at no charge but that was an onerous option since we were already moved into our room.and we would waste an afternoon. Alternatively we were offered a room “upgrade” to larger room. These rooms were still not the king standard we reserved.  No price adjustment was ever offered. They had queen needs instead of King and were slightly larger with sliding door access to  tiny balcony. There was no pool. There was no buffet. Breakfast was a simple menu of soup/pho or fried eggs or fried noodles. There was no juice or fruit or salad. The coffee was ice cold. When we alerted staff  it was reheated not remade. 
I checked the first bed for cleanliness and it was ok. It wasn’t until I got into bed that night in the “upgrade” room that I discovered one pillow on my bed with no pillow
Cover…no problem until you looked at filthy stains all over the pillow. All and all I would never have chosen to stay and this facility and give an opportunity would not stay again even if it were comped completely free.
reviews.negatives: Almost everything except the staff who were responsive as they could be to our question albeit there was very little English spoken at this facility. Our rooms were small and cramped, it was over a day before we learned that the reason there was no hot water was because it was solar powered and now that it is cooler it take “10 MINUTES RUNNING THE THE WATER” to get hot.  This might be something they want to consider telling guests at checkin or place signage for in the rooms. Using this process 1 had one minimally warm shower. The rest were ice cold. The smelled musty, maybe not unusual for a shore hotel in a humid region but still off putting

reviews.title: Vệ sinh kém
reviews.text: Mình ở bên chi nhánh Lê Lợi. Khách sạn có vấn đề về vệ sinh, facilities kém, các vòi nước đóng cặn canxi, sàn chảy nước, phòng vệ sinh có mùi hôi. Ra giường, bao gối rất dơ. Không đáng tiền. Có rất nhiều lựa chọn khác tốt hơn.

reviews.title: Thanks for having me
reviews.positives: was available when the city was saturated
reviews.negatives: Thankns

reviews.title: Thất vọng

reviews.title: Small rooms
reviews.positives: Good location
reviews.negatives:
- Rooms are small for the prices. Other hotels in the neighborhood offer much larger rooms for that prices.
- I booked Delight because of its "breakfast included" service as we travelled in a big group. Yet in the end, disappointedly, the hotel informed us that they could not organize breakfast due to some reasons (26-28 July 2024).

reviews.negatives: facilities in the restroom should be replaced, they have some dirts

reviews.title: Good location, friendly staff but poor facilities.
reviews.text: I have a 3-day, 2-night trip to Quy Nhơn, so I booked a stay here. First, I was quite pleased with the geographical location and the attitude of the staff here. Furthermore, the hotel looks quite new from the outside. However, after checking into the room, I found some inconveniences: first, there is only one electrical socket near the bed, so I couldn't conveniently use the hair dryer. Second, there were no bathroom slippers, which I found lacking. Third, the bathroom light over the sink is a spotlight, so it doesn't illuminate my face properly, making it insufficient for personal hygiene. Fourth, the water here leaks from both the showerhead and the toilet faucet, creating white stains in the bathroom. I tried to turn the knobs in various ways, but both the shower and the sink only provide warm water or hotter. It's hot outside, but I cannot wash with cool water. The fifth issue that dissatisfied me is that there are mosquitoes here, not just one or two. The most disappointing thing is the bed sheets, which had yellow stains, and when I woke up, I had red rashes on both arms, causing itching and irritation. I hope the hotel will renovate for better cleanliness and to maintain its position so that guests will return.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Good location and Room is spacious with nice view

reviews.title: Budget hotel
reviews.text: If you have a very limited budget, this is a good choice. Other than that, there are many better options nearby. The price seems like a great deal, but the hotel is old and not very clean. When I booked, I chose the room with the window as shown in the photo, but they gave me a room without a window. When I said I would like to change, they said all rooms were full, but in fact, it's off-season now, and there were very few guests! The room has poor soundproofing and quite an unpleasant smell, maybe because of poor ventilation.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
La moindre des choses est de mentionner quand une chambre n'a pas de fenêtre.
La salle de bain est vétusté
Beaucoup trop chère pour ce que c'est

reviews.title: Bargain price calculated per person
reviews.text: My family is staying in a room with 3 double beds. Breakfast is provided in the morning. Everything is reasonably fine for the price, except the bathroom smells bad; closing the door makes it even more suffocating.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: L’emplacement et le rapport qualité prix.
reviews.negatives:
La propreté globale de la chambre était plutôt moyenne, et la douche franchement sale.
Nous avons séjourné trois nuits dans cet hôtel. Les deux premières nuits se sont bien passées : c’était correct, confortable, et pour le prix on ne s’attendait pas à plus, mis à part un meilleur nettoyage.
En revanche, la troisième nuit a été très compliquée. L’hôtel a organisé une fête dans la salle du restaurant. Résultat : au 7ᵉ étage, nous avons subi des vibrations et de la musique très forte jusqu’à presque minuit.
Nous sommes descendus à la réception pour demander de baisser le volume, mais la communication a été difficile, et on nous a demandé d’être compréhensifs car “c’était une fête”. Après insistance, une réduction nous a été accordée et on nous a promis que la musique s’arrêterait au plus tard à 21h ou serait au moins baissée. Malheureusement, cela n’a pas été respecté. Nous ne cherchions pas une réduction, mais simplement à pouvoir dormir.
Nous avons eu le sentiment de déranger alors que nous cherchions simplement à nous reposer, ce qui est inacceptable pour un hôtel. Un établissement ne peut pas être à la fois un hôtel et une salle des fêtes sans prévenir les clients.
L’hôtel reste correct dans l’ensemble, mais cette situation a clairement gâché notre nuit

reviews.title: Very good

reviews.negatives:
Ménage très mal fait. 
Nous sommes partie quand la femme de ménage arrivait. Ayant oublié quelque chose je suis remonté à la chambre. En arrivant elle avait fini. Elle a donc fait la chambre sur le temps que je descende et remonte l'ascenseur. Pas étonnant que c'était salle.

Het personeel was aardig, maar spraken geen Engels. Google translate lukt, maar beetje stroef. Voor de rest is het prima. Het ontbijt kan je overslaan, dat was niks aan. Al met al prima voor de prijs

reviews.title: 二度と
reviews.positives:
ホテルエントランス前のシャッターが0時を過ぎると閉まり6時までスタッフが寝ているため、早朝のチェックアウトや深夜の外出が非常に不便。
スタッフも全く英語が喋れず、十分な説明もされない。
また地上階で待機しているセキュリティスタッフ(?)の態度も悪く不快だった。

reviews.title: Stable Hotel
reviews.text: I booked through the app but before booking, I contacted the front desk to ask about the room on the app and was assured to book it. As the check-in date approached, I felt uneasy, so I reached out to check again and found out that the room I booked was not the one I had inquired about with the front desk beforehand. I sent a message to ask further, and the front desk referred me to the booking department to inquire about the issue. The booking department communicated very well and warmly, explained everything in detail, apologized for the issue I encountered, and also defended the front desk. When I received the room, the view exceeded my expectations, it was wonderful. I stayed on the *** 9th floor. However, when I checked in, the door card was broken, and the air conditioning remote was malfunctioning. The front desk was not professional in providing support, but when I messaged the booking department again, I was taken care of very well. The room was decent for the price, but the breakfast area did not look much like the pictures, it seemed temporary. I stayed for 4 days and 3 nights, but only dared to eat breakfast once on the second day, I didn't use the rest. The room did not have good sound insulation; whatever was happening inside like watching TV or talking could be heard outside. Despite many unsatisfactory points, I still appreciated the way the booking department communicated, supported, and chatted with me, so all my discomfort seemed to fade away and I felt quite okay during my stay. By the way, the cleaning staff continuously cleaned and replaced towels and water for me every day; very few hotels do this, often just cleaning as a formality or not taking good care, whether it's a 4-star or 5-star hotel. I might consider coming back here again if possible next time.

reviews.title: Pleasant stay
reviews.text: We had a nice stay at Haku, the staff were very kind and upgraded us to another room away from the noise from the renovations in the lobby. They had communicated this with us before our stay. Location is a bit away from cafes etc but we enjoy walking so was nice central location for us.

reviews.title: Không nên lưu trú cho kì nghỉ. Nếu có thể bất đắc dĩ thì nghỉ 1 đêm. Nhưng đừng nghĩ và kì vọng sạch

reviews.title: Overnight stay in Quy Nhon city center.
reviews.text: Overnight stay in Quy Nhon center during the holiday with Agoda promotion for a twin room at 700k, I paid a little less. I like that there are many dining options just outside the door. It's just over 100 meters to the beach. Very satisfied.

reviews.title: Rất tệ!
reviews.positives: Chỗ đậu xe thoải mái, rộng rãi. Chỗ ngủ nhá thoải mái.
reviews.negatives: Bộ phận nhân viên dọn dẹp kiểm tra phòng làm việc cẩu thả. Lúc vào phòng đôi chỉ có 2 đôi dép mang trong nhà nhưng khi trả phòng lại nói là 3 đôi và tính phí đôi còn lại. Còn nói phòng đấy 10 ngày rồi không có khách đặt và khi vào phòng tôi còn thấy chỗ để quần áo có một món đồ mà vị khách trước kia để lại vì khá tế nhị nên không tiện nói với lễ tân. Tôi đánh giá rất tệ công tác làm việc của nhân viên khách sạn, không cho khách hàng sự an tâm nhất định khi sử dụng dịch vụ, làm chúng tôi phải bồi thường đôi dép 40k và chúng tôi bị xem như là kẻ ăn cắp vậy!

reviews.title: Xứng đáng để trải nghiệm khi tới Quy Nhơn
reviews.text: 10 điểm dành cho sự nhiệt thành của các bạn nhân viên. Vô cùng tận tâm, cởi mở và dễ chịu, thật sự nhờ việc này mình mới quyết đặt khách sạn bởi các bạn hỗ trợ ngay cả khi mình chưa đặt phòng. Phòng cũng nhỏ xinh, đầy đủ tiện nghi và vô cùng sạch sẽ, điểm cộng lớn thứ 2. Có bữa sáng đơn giản. Gần biển tầm 300m là tới, cũng là khu có đồ ăn và cửa hàng tiện lợi. Một trong những lựa chọn vững bền cho chuyến đi lần tới

reviews.title: Disappointed
reviews.text: I had a very disappointing experience at this hotel. The room was extremely old and poorly maintained, and it was also very dirty. The bed sheets, bathroom, and floor did not seem to be cleaned properly, which made the stay very uncomfortable. In addition, the reception staff were unprofessional and not very helpful when assistance was needed. Overall, I would not recommend this hotel and would not choose to stay here again.

Hơi buồn là mình đặt trễ, nên hết phòng tầng cao. Lần sau sẽ đặt sớm hơn xíu hihi
reviews.negatives: Không có

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Không gian ở đây khá là thoáng mát, sạch sẽ, nhân viên vô cùng thân thiện và giúp đỡ cho mình rất nhiều luôn í. Đây sẽ luôn là lựa chọn của tớ nếu tớ đi với gia đình

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Khách sạn dẹp,  gần biển, nhân viên thân thiện,  hỗ trợ nhiệt tình. Đồ ăn sáng rất ngon và vừa miệng
reviews.negatives: Không

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Phòng có view đẹp,đầy đủ tiện nghi, có phục vụ ăn sáng miễn phí. Lần sau sẽ quay lại.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Khách sạn gần biển rất tiện lợi. Nhân viên thân thiện, giúp đỡ khách xách đồ, 10 đ cho sự dễ thương của ks. Nếu có cơ hội sẽ quay trở lại đâyy

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Khách sạn gần biển, sạch sẽ, nhân viên rất nhiệt tình, gia đình tôi đã có một trải nghiệm vô cùng tuyệt vời, tôi sẽ còn quay lại khách sạn nhiều lần nữa. Điểm 10 cho khách sạn🥰🥰

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Gia đình tôi có thời gian lưu trú tại khách sạn thật tuyệt vời, khách sạn gần biển, sạch sẽ, đẹp, giá rẻ,  nhân viên nhiệt tình , thân thiện hỗ trợ khách. Điểm 10 cho khách sạn nè.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
Breakfast was advertised as buffet but it was actually a call to order service. We stayed there during Tet Holiday season and we tried to make sense that hotel didnt have much people to work on holiday. however, the attitude of the staff and breakfast lady made us feel this wasnt worth our money and no apology for wrong information regarding breakfast. 
Not to mention the room had insects and full of noises. 
Overall, i wont stay this hotel  again despite a good location to the beach.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: There seemed to be a bitbof a bait and switch as they have two facilities. Pictures on Booking.com were misleading. Breakfast was disappointing,definitely not as described in the pictures. Communication with the staff was very difficult. Checking out required waiting while someone went to the other hotel to get "the credit card machine".

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: unfortunately the staff does not know the laws on checking in foreigners in a hotel they refused to check in without a printed evisa explain more about visa-free regimes and a stamp in the passport they don't understand anything

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Not much
reviews.negatives: Not clean,breakfast was very poor and no communication with staff

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Quite good location -near beach. Basic room and service, worth with the cost.
reviews.negatives: Elevator is limitted, have to wait in traffic time

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: It was basic and relatively clean and nice view
reviews.negatives: The breakfast wasn’t good. There wasn’t much to chose from just a few things from the pan.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Great location
reviews.negatives: Brekky advertised was not on offer. Cooked egg as requested. No juice or coffee offered.

reviews.title: excellent location
reviews.positives: Hotel in a very good location, close to a nice sandy beach. The hotel has parking and a lift, nice service. Room of a good size with everything you need. Shower with hot water, comfortable mattress. Breakfast was not a buffet only a few dishes from the menu to order, it was a bit disappointing but I understand that it is winter and there are less people in the hotel.

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.positives: Close to the beach. Clean and nice room. Helpful people at the reception
reviews.negatives: Breakfast was quite small

reviews.title: Comfort place for my trip
reviews.positives: Located in the center of the city, nice room. Friendly staff, adorable city

reviews.title: Evitar las habitaciones sin ventana
reviews.positives: La ubicación y el personal.
reviews.negatives: Me dieron una habitación sin ventana que no figuraba que sería así al momento de contratarla. Las fotos difieren de la realidad. Los accesorios del baño están viejos y las paredes manchadas.
